title: NovaCape
description: NovaClient Cape Mod – Add and manage your own custom capes locally with drag & drop support. Fully client-side, easy to use, and works seamlessly with NovaClient.
body:
NovaClient Cape Mod – Drag & Drop Custom Capes (Animated Supported)

Unlock full customization of your in-game capes with the ultimate local-only addon for NovaClient. Effortlessly drag and drop your own PNG or GIF capes straight into the dedicated folder—no accounts, no cloud uploads, just instant personalization.

Key Highlights:

Drag & Drop Ease – Simply place your custom PNG or GIF capes into the capes folder.

Animated Capes – Supports dynamic GIFs or frame-sequence PNGs for a vibrant, animated look in-game.

Fully Client-Side – All capes stay local to your client; nothing is uploaded or shared.

NovaClient Compatible – Designed specifically to integrate smoothly with NovaClient.

Usage Instructions:

Open the capes folder within the mod directory.

Drag and drop your cape files (PNG or GIF).

Launch Minecraft with NovaClient and enjoy your newly equipped animated cape instantly!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=krIK0Yzi1nE
